description:
Automate your patch management

Update third-party software, deploy custom scripts, and make impactful configuration changes to your on-prem Windows devices in minutes with PDQ Deploy.
Changes/Improvements
- Upgrade SQLite to 3.50.4 to address flagging of CVE-2025-29087

Bug Fixes
- Fix lengthy version upgrade times after 19.4.77.0
- Fix sporadic occurrence of thread owner exceptions
- Fix display of disabled buttons when using a Windows 11 theme
- Deploy: Fixed bug where steps column did not update as a package was being deployed
